change_comments.message: SDNC is no longer maintaining Elasticsearch as an option - only mariadb.

@Dan, I'd like to submit this change for two reasons:

- I need a working master branch to test other changes too [0]
- I'd like to be able to backport this fix to the paris branch that it is possible to still use that release

I understand that we will more or less immediately submit your change after that, so please don't understand that as some attempt from me to stick to the old architecture here

[0] master is currently broken because of the ImagePullError for the bitnami/elasticsearch

Ah okay ... I get the reason for this now. I was concerned that my pending change was going to end up overwriting this change, since it comments out the Elasticsearch support.  We were planning to just remove it entirely eventually - just commenting for now in case we find that we need it later.
